calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-28-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
Michael Rossoff, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Northridge Cooperative Homes
Serene Cogman, defendant in pro per

The parties indicated that this matter has settled. Terms of the settlement are as follows:
The parties stipulated for judgment/dismissal regarding property located at 120 Harbor Road, #219, S.F., CA. Defendant to pay plaintiff $1,500.00 this date which has been received. the remainder $6,992.00 and attorney's fees in the amount of $750.00 to be paid by installments of $1,000.00 commencing Aug. 1, 2004 with last installment of $742.00 on March 1, 2005. If there is any non-compliance to the terms of the stipulation, plaintiff to request the Court to enter judgment of amounts remaining and immediate restitution and possession plus additional $500.00 attorneys fees. If terms are fully complied with, plaintiff to filed dismissal with prejudice. All parties agreed to the terms in open court. Stipulation for Judgment/Dismissal was signed and filed.

JUDGE DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTERS: J. BRYCE, #3321 & S. BRANN, #3887 (504)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2004 Off Calendar

CASE NOT SETTLED.
